## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what does this PR do? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature or capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — build, deps, tooling
- [ ] refactor — restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] security — security fix or hardening

## What changed and why
<!-- Brief description. Link to backlog item or spec if applicable. -->

## Testing done
<!-- How was this tested? `uv run pytest` result, manual test steps. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Version updated if this is a releasable change
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uvx ruff check . && uvx ruff format --check .` clean
- [ ] `ai/BACKLOG.md` updated — tasks marked complete or added
- [ ] `ai/SESSION.md` updated with what was done
- [ ] `ai/MEMORY.md` updated if any architectural decisions were made
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, cookies, or secrets in any committed file
- [ ] Security checklist passed (see `ai/SECURITY.md`)

## Notes for reviewer
<!-- Anything the reviewer should know — risks, follow-up items, upstream PR impact. -->
